headline: AI Is Driving the Market: J.P. Morgan Picks 2 Stocks With Direct Exposure
summary: Amid ongoing macro uncertainty, Joyce Chang, Chair of Global Research at JPMorgan, says a more persistent force is shaping the market – AI. headline: Is Salesforce (CRM) Now An Opportunity After A 27.5% Year To Date Share Price Slide?
summary: Wondering whether Salesforce at around US$183.82 still makes sense for your portfolio, or if the recent slide has changed the story entirely? The stock is up 3.2% over the last week, while the 30 day return is a 1.8% decline and the year to date move sits at a 27.5% decline. That has contributed to a 32.7% decline over the last year and a 13.8% decline over five years. Recent headlines have focused on Salesforce's role in large scale enterprise software deployments and its position within...
